# Record ledger is authored by Pinax CLI commands.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

exec pinax record init --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=record.init'
stdout 'fact.records_path=.pinax/records'

exec pinax note new Alpha --body '# Alpha' --vault vault --json
stdout '"note_id"'
stdout '"ledger_status":"updated"'

exec pinax record adopt --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=record.adopt'
stdout 'fact.adopted=0'
stdout 'fact.records=1'

exec pinax record status --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"record.status"'
stdout '"records":"1"'
stdout '"ledger_seq":"1"'

exec pinax record history alpha.md --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=record.history'
stdout 'fact.lifecycle=active'

exists vault/.pinax/records/events.jsonl
exists vault/.pinax/records/notes.json
exists vault/.pinax/records/tombstones.json
exists vault/.pinax/records/version.json


exec pinax search Alpha --at HEAD --include-dirty --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=note.search'
stdout 'status=success'

! exec pinax search Alpha --revision abc123 --vault vault --agent
stdout 'error.code=version_read_unavailable'
